mapper.select: SELECT `id`, `updated_at`, `next_refresh_at` FROM `ir_profile`.`ranking_snapshots` WHERE `status` = 0 ORDER BY `updated_at` DESC, `created_at` DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT `gender`, `rank_no`, `name`, `country`, `points`, `ntrp`, `source` FROM `ir_profile`.`world_ranking_players` WHERE `snapshot_id` = #{snapshotId} AND `status` = 0 ORDER BY `gender`, `rank_no`

SELECT `rank_no`, `name`, `city`, `level`, `ntrp`, `utr`, `matches`, `group_wins` FROM `ir_profile`.`city_ranking_players` WHERE `snapshot_id` = #{snapshotId} AND `status` = 0 ORDER BY `city`, `level` DESC, `rank_no`
